privileged_info_summary: The wine_tasting_organizer task uses synthetic data consisting of 12 wines with 4 types (Red, White, Sparkling, Rosé). The ratings are intentionally inconsistent across 5 formats: star ratings (4-5 stars), numeric ratings (6/10-9/10 scale), and text descriptions (Excellent, Good, Okay, Poor). Prices are messy with 7 values containing $ symbols and 5 numeric values without symbols, requiring cleaning. The data is procedurally generated in the setup_task.sh script, not from an external source.
